title: Pixel Girls
description: Adds women to the game. Made with StationAPI for b1.7.3.
body:
Adds women that spawn around your world, either in villages or just around. Click on a woman to make her follow you, click again to let her wander.

Women currently in the mod:

- Senko (from _The Helpful Fox Senko-San_)
- Koishi (from _Touhou Project_)
- Miku (from _Vocaloid_)
- Sakura Miku (from _Vocaloid_)

Look in the gallery to see what they look like!
